title: Option to set reminders for replies to updates
excerpt: It would be super helpful if there was a little bell to set up reminders for replies to updates, just like there is for updates themselves when clicking on the conversation bubble next to an item.

posts.author: ZahidE (Zahid Ehsan)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be super helpful if there was a little bell to set up reminders for replies to updates, just like there is for updates themselves when clicking on the conversation bubble next to an item.
